get.description:
Fetch GSTR1 summary (short or long).

Examples:
    /gstr1/summary/{gstin}/2023/12
    /gstr1/summary/{gstin}/2023/12?summary_type=long

parameters.name: action_required

schema.description: Y = action needed, N = already accepted/uploaded
schema.title: Action Required

parameters.description: Y = action needed, N = already accepted/uploaded

get.description:
Fetch GSTR-2B for the given GSTIN and return period.

Query params:
  - file_number (int, optional): Required when status_cd=3 is returned.
    Call once without it to get file_count, then call again with
    file_number=1 through file_count to retrieve all invoice pages.
List all configured clients with their latest session metadata.
Aggregated GST metrics + filing status for a GSTIN.
Ledger analytics: balances, monthly totals, transaction counts.
Return summaries for GSTR1, GSTR2B, GSTR3B.
Session status: active sessions, expiry, last refresh.
